topics.title: seekdb hybrid search returns empty — knn + BM25 in one SQL
topics.excerpt: Running DBMS_HYBRID_SEARCH on a 50k doc table; vector leg works alone but combined query returns 0 rows.
topics.author: alex_dev
topics.body:
Running DBMS_HYBRID_SEARCH on a 50k doc table. Vector leg alone returns results; combined knn + BM25 query returns 0 rows.

SELECT doc_id, title, score
FROM DBMS_HYBRID_SEARCH.SEARCH(
  'knowledge_base',
  '{"knn":{"k":5},"query":"agent memory"}'
);

seekdb 1.2 · macOS · table has both vector column and FTS index.

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: Check that the FTS index finished building (SHOW INDEX) and that recall threshold isn’t filtering everything. Try lowering k to 3 for a smoke test.

replies.author: alex_dev
replies.body: FTS was still BUILDING — waited and it works now. Thanks!

topics.title: How to install OceanBase on Kubernetes (minimal prod checklist)?
topics.excerpt: Looking for a hardened single-replica dev setup vs. 3-node obcluster for staging.
topics.author: platform_eng
topics.body: Looking for a hardened single-replica dev setup vs. 3-node obcluster for staging. Any Helm values or operator tips?

replies.author: harry_z
replies.body: Start with the official ob-operator quickstart; for staging use 3 observers + 1 OBProxy. Happy to share our values.yaml stripped of secrets.

topics.title: Vector index build fails after upgrade to 4.3
topics.excerpt: IVF index rebuild stalls at 78%; logs show memory limit on observer node.
topics.author: dba_sea
topics.body: IVF index rebuild stalls at 78%; observer logs show memory limit on the node. 32GB RAM, 4c.

topics.title: MySQL compatibility: GROUP BY behavior difference migration
topics.excerpt: Porting from MySQL 8 — only_full_group_by queries failing on OceanBase.
topics.author: migrator
topics.body: Porting from MySQL 8 — queries with ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY fail on OceanBase with different error text. Anyone mapped the gaps?

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: See docs on sql_mode parity; we’re tracking a few edge cases in 4.3.1 release notes.
